# Test fixtures (quick index)

Full documentation: **[`docs/test-fixtures.md`](../../docs/test-fixtures.md)** — sample videos, meeting WAVs, sources, licenses, and CLI examples.

```bash
task fixtures:fetch
```

Paths for tests: `tests/fixtures/paths.py`. E2e smoke tests use locally generated sample video (no live Teams/mic) — see **E2E tests** in [`docs/test-fixtures.md`](../../docs/test-fixtures.md).
